item.title: Assisted dying bill fails to become law after running out of time in parliament – UK politics live
item.description: Bill had successfully passed two votes in the Commons but did not face a vote in the Lords Downing Street has hit back at reports suggesting the US co...

item.title: Justice department watchdog will investigate release of Epstein files – US politics live

item.title: Berlin culture minister resigns over irregular distribution of funds to fight antisemitism
item.description: Auditor found Sarah Wedl-Wilson approved payments of public money to groups that had not been fully vetted Berlin’s top culture official, British-born...

item.title: Trump says he will ‘probably put a big tariff on the UK’ if it doesn’t drop digital services tax
item.description: President accuses Britain of trying to ‘make an easy buck’ from American tech firms, weeks after warning UK–US trade deal can be changed Business live...
